raw_title: When Software Becomes the Newsroom: Journalists and the Loss of Organizational Connections
title_en: When Software Becomes the Newsroom: Journalists and the Loss of Organizational Connections
title_zh: 当软件成为新闻编辑室：记者与组织联系的丧失
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了当新闻编辑室越来越多地依赖软件和自动化技术时，记者如何失去与组织的传统联系。它关注技术变革对新闻工作实践和组织结构的影响。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how journalists lose traditional organizational connections as newsrooms increasingly rely on software and automation. It focuses on the impact of technological changes on journalistic practices and organizational structures.
research_direction_zh: 数字新闻领域的技术变革对新闻职业和组织结构的影响研究
research_direction_en: Research on the impact of technological changes in digital journalism on journalistic profession and organizational structures
